title: Montclair Heritage Full-Grain Leather Weekender Bag
seoTitle: Montclair Heritage Leather Weekender — Full-Grain Leather Travel Bag
metaDescription: Travel in timeless style with the Montclair Heritage Weekender—handcrafted full-grain leather, brass hardware, dedicated laptop and shoe compartments. Lifetime warranty.
shortDescription: A handcrafted full-grain leather weekender designed for refined travel. Thoughtful organization, rugged durability and classic styling for modern journeys.
longDescription:
The Montclair Heritage Weekender is a premium travel companion crafted from full-grain Italian leather and finished with solid brass hardware. Sized for overnight trips and weekend escapes, it combines classic aesthetics with modern functionality: a padded laptop sleeve, a removable ventilated shoe compartment, a quick-access exterior pocket, and a spacious main compartment lined with water-resistant cotton blend. Each bag is hand-stitched by experienced artisans and finished with burnished edges and an embossed logo for understated elegance.

Built to age beautifully, the leather develops a unique patina with use while maintaining structural integrity thanks to reinforced stitching and durable metal fittings. Practical travel features include an interior zip pocket for valuables, a trolley sleeve that slips over handle bars, and a detachable crossbody strap with leather shoulder pad for comfortable carry. The Montclair comes packaged in a dust bag and includes a full lifetime warranty covering craftsmanship and hardware.

Dimensions: 20" L x 11" H x 10" D (fits 15" laptop). Weight: 3.6 lbs. Care: condition with a quality leather balm and store in the provided dust bag when not in use. Ideal for weekend getaways, business travel, and as a refined everyday carry.
features: Full-grain Italian leather that develops a natural patina
Solid brass hardware and YKK locking zipper for lasting reliability
Padded 15" laptop sleeve with quick-access top entry
Removable ventilated shoe compartment to separate footwear from clothing
Trolley sleeve for secure attachment to rolling luggage
Detachable leather-trimmed crossbody strap and reinforced leather handles
Interior zip and slip pockets for organization; water-resistant lining
Hand-stitched construction with burnished edges; lifetime craftsmanship warranty
